name: Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups milk or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and baking powder.
2. Add the beaten eggs, salt, and sugar to the dry ingredients. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the milk and melted lard, stirring until the batter is smooth.
4. Pour the batter onto a hot griddle or frying pan, using about 1/4 cup for each pancake.
5. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes and the edges start to look dry.
6. Flip the pancakes and cook the other side until golden brown.
7. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
